item.title: How Rules of Engagement Affected Soldiers’ Lives
item.description: Exploring the impact of rules of engagement on soldiers in combat. Real stories highlight challenges, tough decisions, and the lasting effects on those who serve.

media:content.media:title: How Rules of Engagement Affected Soldiers’ Lives
media:content.media:description: Exploring the impact of rules of engagement on soldiers in combat. Real stories highlight challenges, tough decisions, and the lasting effects on those who serve.

item.title: Shot Multiple Times Trying to Save Marines
item.description: A harrowing account of a service member wounded while risking everything to save fellow Marines. A story of courage, sacrifice, and survival under fire.

media:content.media:title: Shot Multiple Times Trying to Save Marines
media:content.media:description: A harrowing account of a service member wounded while risking everything to save fellow Marines. A story of courage, sacrifice, and survival under fire.

item.title: The Beautiful Way I Ended My War
item.description: A veteran shares the meaningful and transformative way they concluded their military service. A heartfelt story of closure, reflection, and new beginnings.

media:content.media:title: The Beautiful Way I Ended My War
media:content.media:description: A veteran shares the meaningful and transformative way they concluded their military service. A heartfelt story of closure, reflection, and new beginnings.

item.title: How I Evaded Capture from the Viet Cong
item.description: A firsthand account of escaping capture during the Vietnam War. Hear the tense strategies, survival tactics, and courage it took to evade the Viet Cong.

media:content.media:title: How I Evaded Capture from the Viet Cong
media:content.media:description: A firsthand account of escaping capture during the Vietnam War. Hear the tense strategies, survival tactics, and courage it took to evade the Viet Cong.

item.title: Behind the Scenes: How War Dramas Changed Lives
item.description: Actors and veterans share how working on war dramas impacted them. Behind-the-scenes stories reveal personal growth, perspective shifts, and life-changing experiences.

media:content.media:title: Behind the Scenes: How War Dramas Changed Lives
media:content.media:description: Actors and veterans share how working on war dramas impacted them. Behind-the-scenes stories reveal personal growth, perspective shifts, and life-changing experiences.

item.title: They Made Us Hate David Schwimmer in Band of Brothers
item.description: A behind-the-scenes look at how actors were directed to evoke strong emotions in Band of Brothers. See how David Schwimmer’s character sparked intense reactions.

media:content.media:title: They Made Us Hate David Schwimmer in Band of Brothers
media:content.media:description: A behind-the-scenes look at how actors were directed to evoke strong emotions in Band of Brothers. See how David Schwimmer’s character sparked intense reactions.

item.title: How a Beer Run Became a WWII Legend
item.description: A humorous yet heroic WWII story where a simple beer run turned legendary. Discover the events, bravery, and camaraderie that made this moment unforgettable.

media:content.media:title: How a Beer Run Became a WWII Legend
media:content.media:description: A humorous yet heroic WWII story where a simple beer run turned legendary. Discover the events, bravery, and camaraderie that made this moment unforgettable.

item.title: WWII Veteran Sings “Blood on the Risers”
item.description: WWII veteran Vincent Speranza performs the iconic paratrooper song “Blood on the Risers” alongside @robriggle, sharing history, humor, and nostalgia.

media:content.media:title: WWII Veteran Sings “Blood on the Risers”
media:content.media:description: WWII veteran Vincent Speranza performs the iconic paratrooper song “Blood on the Risers” alongside @robriggle, sharing history, humor, and nostalgia.

item.title: PFC Ted Below: .38 Revolver Saved My Life
item.description: PFC Theodore “Ted” Below recounts landing in the first wave on Iwo Jima. Hear how his .38 revolver played a crucial role in saving his life during intense combat.

media:content.media:title: PFC Ted Below: .38 Revolver Saved My Life
media:content.media:description: PFC Theodore “Ted” Below recounts landing in the first wave on Iwo Jima. Hear how his .38 revolver played a crucial role in saving his life during intense combat.
